name: Fade In
description: Gradually increases opacity from fully transparent to fully visible
best_for: opening shots intro sequences first scene

name: Fade Out
description: Gradually decreases opacity from fully visible to fully transparent

name: Cross Dissolve
description: Blends two clips by simultaneously fading out one and fading in the next
best_for: smooth scene transitions passage of time emotional beats

name: Fade from Black
description: Emerges from solid black into the scene
best_for: video openings chapter starts dramatic reveals

name: Fade to Black
best_for: video endings chapter breaks dramatic pauses

name: Wipe Left
description: New scene sweeps in from right to left replacing the current scene
best_for: sequential content step-by-step flows dynamic presentations

name: Wipe Right
description: New scene sweeps in from left to right replacing the current scene
best_for: sequential content forward progression timeline flows

name: Wipe Up
description: New scene sweeps in from bottom to top replacing the current scene
best_for: reveals upward energy ascending themes growth content

name: Wipe Down
description: New scene sweeps in from top to bottom replacing the current scene
best_for: reveals descending themes data drops grounding content

name: Zoom In
description: Camera zooms into the next scene creating a push-in focus effect
best_for: emphasis detail reveals product close-ups focus moments

name: Zoom Out
description: Camera zooms out from the next scene creating a pull-back reveal effect
best_for: reveals context establishing landscape wide perspective

name: Hard Cut
description: Immediate switch from one clip to the next with no transition effect
best_for: fast-paced edits dialogue scenes action sequences matched cuts

name: Morph Cut
description: Smooth morphing blend between two similar frames for seamless continuity
best_for: talking head edits interview jump cuts seamless dialogue

name: J-Cut
description: Audio from the next scene begins before the visual transition occurs
best_for: dialogue scenes building anticipation narrative storytelling

name: L-Cut
description: Audio from the current scene continues over the visual of the next scene
best_for: dialogue continuity emotional resonance reaction shots

name: Slide Push
description: Current scene is pushed off screen by the incoming scene sliding in
best_for: content sections topic changes slide-style presentations
